name: Bree M.
one_line_review: "Easy to use, reliable, and excellent customer service"
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

Nothing! I don't think I have anything I don't like at this time.

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

I don't have to go to all these sites to change hours when we have to close early or have a holiday. I also have confidence that I don't have a ton of duplicate locations in Google, etc.
reviewer_details:
Director Of Marketing And Community Relations

Mid-Market (51-1000 emp.)
